creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text:
the patch fixes wg(8) at least when no tunnels are configured:

[3!] daphne ~# uname -v
FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #4 lf/main-n269059-d5fdf4feedd2: Fri Sep  6 14:58:45 BST 2024     srcmastr@daphne.eden.le-fay.org:/src/obj/src/freebsd/lf/main/arm64.aarch64/sys/LFV6
[4!] daphne ~# wg
[5!] daphne ~# 

i'm waiting for my amd64 build to finish at which point i can test this on a system with IPv6-only tunnels configured.
